user.title: VW Group EU Data Act
user.description: Select your vehicle brand. All VW Group brands are supported through the EU Data Act portal.

credentials.title: Sign in
credentials.description: Enter your VW-ID credentials (same as on eu-data-act.drivesomethinggreater.com).

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. If using Škoda/Audi/SEAT/CUPRA, make sure to select the correct brand.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the EU Data Act portal.
error.no_vehicles: No vehicles were found for this account. Make sure you have linked your vehicle on eu-data-act.drivesomethinggreater.com first.

abort.auth: Authentication failed; please re-add the integration.
